g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Lead Identification stage in the tender lifecycle')
sendPrompt('How is the Bid/No-Bid decision made in tender management?')
sendPrompt('What documents are prepared in the tender document preparation stage?')
sendPrompt('What happens at the pre-bid meeting stage?')
sendPrompt('What happens during the tender submission stage?')
sendPrompt('What is monitored during post-submission evaluation?')
sendPrompt('How is a lost tender recorded and analysed?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a tender is won?')
sendPrompt('What is tracked during the delivery and execution phase?')
sendPrompt('How does the learning loop feed back into future tender bids?')
